name: Media Bar
description: Adds a featured Media Bar to the top of the Jellyfin home page. Forked from IAmParadox27/jellyfin-plugin-media-bar with first-paint loading optimizations.
overview: A featured content slideshow bar for the Jellyfin home screen.

versions.changelog: Performance fork: same-origin assets, single bulk item fetch (no N+1), non-blocking trailer/SponsorBlock loading.

Initial release of this fork: Media Bar plugin with first-paint speedups. Web assets (slideshowpure.js/css) are embedded and served same-origin via the MediaBar controller instead of from a third-party CDN.
